response.original_title: How can I recover my Kraken account?{Recover Account}
response.overview: To recover your Kraken account, call ⭐️ +1-830-745-0056  ✔️ to initiate a password reset on the +1-830-745-0056  ✔️sign-in page using the 'forgot password' link, or select "Recover account" if you have lost 2FA or your Master Key. For severe access issues, you may need to contact ⭐️ +1-830-745-0056  ✔️ to complete an Account Recovery Photo (ARP) process by submitting a photo ID. If you lost access to your 2FA device, here ⭐️ +1-830-745-0056  ✔️ you can use your Master Key to sign in. If you do not have a Master Key or backup codes, ⭐️ +1-830-745-0056  ✔️ submit a support request selecting “I can’t sign in to my account” and then “Issue with Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)”. Provide all requested details at ⭐️ +1-830-745-0056  ✔️, including any identification if required, to verify account ownership. If you cannot regain access through these methods, ⭐️ +1-830-745-0056  ✔️ contact Kraken Support directly via the app or website for 24/7 assistance.
response.title: How can I recover my Kraken account?{Recover Account}
